title: Link's 3D Rails
description: This is some 3D rails I made in Blockbench designed to fit within the Vanilla world!
body:
This is a 3D rails Texture pack that I made designed to make the rails 3D while still fitting the Vanilla look of the game.

### Now avaliable on CurseForge:
[![Download on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-Download-orange?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/links-3d-rails)

# How the Rails Look:
The Rails line up with each other seamlessly!
![The Rails connect seemlessly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ecbecdeef14ea979d5a946d18d94b15264d5251.png)
The Detector Rail when activated looks like the button is pushed!
![Detector Rail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc0f20af905289d98bb4ad313c8f57bedc95aef3.png)
![Detector Rail On](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a14c2e5c3bf0364483b6e6cc82348a08a161377.png)
